headline: Apple's Revamped iPhone SE To Kickstart Pivotal Year Amid Challenges

headline: Elon Musk's Former Employees Warn Federal Workers About Long Hours, Firings, And Much More
summary: Elon Musk, known for his unconventional leadership style, is reportedly causing some unrest within the traditionally steady federal workforce.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Feb 3-Feb 7): Meta Plans Not To Comply With The EU AI Code Of Practice, Apple Raises AppleCare+ Service' Subscription Cost & More
summary: Federal appeals court skeptical of Alphabet's efforts to overturn jury verdict in favor of Fortnite-maker Epic Games. Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI to advance to trial, regarding their transition to a for-profit model. Earnings results from Spotify, Take-Two, and Palantir beat estimates. Apple faces criticism for limited watch faces and rumored product releases in March.

headline: Lucid's Record Deliveries, Figure AI's Breakthrough, Tesla's Hiring Spree And More: This Week In Mobility
summary: Lucid Group reported record deliveries, Figure AI made major breakthrough, Boeing changed Starliner leadership, Tesla gears up for hiring.

summary: Skyworks Solutions, Estee Lauder, Venture Global, Neurocrine Biosciences, Moderna, Illumina, IDEX Corporation, PTC Inc, PayPal Holdings, Skechers U.S.A. and Avantor were worst performers, fell up to 25%.

headline: Pixar-Style Robots, iPhone SE Updates, AppleCare+ Price Hike, Spring 2025 Lineup, And More: This Week In Appleverse
summary: Summary: Apple has been making strides in innovation and product updates, with a Pixar-style robot prototype and a new iPhone SE. AppleCare+ prices increased, and a spring 2025 lineup is expected.

headline: Trump's Sovereign Wealth Fund, Iran Sanctions, Tariffs, Musk's DOGE Target, And Tax Plans: Top Economics Updates This Week
summary: The week has been a whirlwind of economic and political developments. From the announcement of the first-ever U.S. sovereign wealth fund to escalating tensions with Iran, the Trump administration has been making headlines. Meanwhile, Elon Musk's ambitious DOGE target and Trump's controversial tax plans have stirred up debates. Here's a recap of the top stories.

headline: Musk's Government Role, Trump's Tariffs, Bukele's Prison Proposal, DOGE Scandal, And Chevron's Venezuela Business: This Week In Politics
summary: Last week was a whirlwind of news with major developments from the White House to El Salvador. Musk's new role, Trump's tariffs, Bukele's prison proposal, DOGE scandal, and Chevron's Venezuela business were top stories.
